title: lauro-cerasus lusitanica
intro: Lauro-cerasus lusitanica, also known as the Portuguese laurel or Prunus lusitanica, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This evergreen shrub or small tree is native to the western coast of Europe and North Africa, and it has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lauro-cerasus lusitanica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be made by steeping its leaves in hot water or mixing them with other herbs to create a medicinal concoction.
